name: Coumarin 153
plain_summary: Laser dye and solvatochromism standard among coumarins; strong ICT band in the blue-violet.

abs.plain_caption: Main ICT absorption near ~420–430 nm in common organic solvents.
abs.lit: Teaching multi-Gaussian near literature Coumarin 153 λ_max (~420–430 nm; solvent-dependent). Cite primary dye tables for exact values.
